# IDEA Inbox

Use this file to propose potential features.

## Classification Buckets
- `very good`: strong value, clear priority, create ticket now
- `good`: useful and feasible, create ticket now
- `need but not now`: keep in backlog with reason and revisit date
- `no need`: reject with short reason

## Entry Template
- id: IDEA-<number>
- title:
- problem:
- proposed outcome:
- submitted_by:
- date:
- classification: <very good|good|need but not now|no need>
- rationale:
- next_action: <create-ticket|backlog|reject>
- linked_ticket: <ticket-id or N/A>

## PO Rule
- Review all entries.
- Create ticket only for `very good` and `good`.
- Store tickets in `.github/skills/a_tool/tickets/`.
